title: varlink: fix usage message, URI is now optional
body:
38199f4c made the URI argument to podman-varlink optional.
Fix the usage message to indicate this.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude @mheon Does this PR need a rebase to fix the issue, obviously the PR is not causing the issue.
Yes, master is green now - rebase should fix this

Rebased against 2ded1f61 in case that's the CI fixer. (It was merged after my first rebase)
